rationale: Acting on Review 2 yields a materially better PR by addressing the same confirmed scope violations (bundling FiniteType+geomReduced against explicit 'don't bundle' roadmap note; naive ring-nilpotence IsUnipotent against roadmap ⚠; True-stub Reductive/Semisimple classes adding no math) plus the AlgPoints k-only definition that directly contradicts the functor-of-points design note and is visible in the diff; Review 1's guidance removes the classes but leaves the AlgPoints mismatch and over-removes content that Review 2's targeted edits would preserve in roadmap-aligned form.
